permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., existing contract drafts or template files) from the workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to write or save generated employment documents (contracts, offer letters, handbooks) to the workspace. Allow?
This skill references external resources such as SHRM, the Department of Labor, and the EEOC. Allow fetching content from those URLs?
This skill may load or dispatch authored sub-skills within the agent runtime. Allow?
